items.name: detect
items.title: detect
items.description: Environment detection helpers: isWsl, isCi, isWindows, isMac, isLinux, isHeadlessLinux, hasCommand, currentPlatform. Shared across platform blocks. Auto-installed as dependency.

items.name: open-url
items.title: open-url
items.description: Open a URL in the user's default browser across macOS, Linux, Windows, WSL, SSH sessions, and headless CI. Fallback chain with BROWSER env override and manual print fallback.

items.name: json-mode
items.title: json-mode
items.description: Dual-rendering output helpers for CLIs serving both humans and agents. Auto-detects TTY vs piped, enforces stdout/stderr discipline, respects NO_COLOR. Never calls process.exit.

items.name: next-steps
items.title: next-steps
items.description: Post-command guidance for agents and humans. Emit structured next-step hints to stderr (NDJSON for agents, formatted block for humans). Chains with json-mode.

items.name: copy-clipboard
items.title: copy-clipboard
items.description: Copy text to the system clipboard across macOS, Linux (X11 + Wayland), Windows, and WSL. Typed verdict, never throws. Detects pbcopy, xclip, xsel, wl-copy, clip.exe automatically.

items.name: notify-os
items.title: notify-os
items.description: Fire a system notification across macOS (osascript), Linux (notify-send), Windows and WSL (PowerShell). Silently skips in CI. Typed verdict, never throws.

items.name: xdg-paths
items.title: xdg-paths
items.description: XDG Base Directory Spec resolver with macOS (Library) and Windows (AppData) fallbacks. Gives your CLI canonical config/state/cache/audit/sessions paths. APP_HOME env override for testing.

items.name: atomic-write
items.title: atomic-write
items.description: Write files atomically: temp file, fsync, rename. Prevents corruption from crashes or concurrent CLI processes. Windows-aware (unlink before rename). Includes atomicWriteJson convenience.

items.name: audit-log
items.title: audit-log
items.description: Append-only JSONL audit trail with per-day rotation. Every action gets a timestamped record. mode 0o600. Includes tailAudit for reading recent records. Battle-tested in hapi-cli and sunat-cli.

items.name: banner
items.title: banner
items.description: Gradient ASCII wordmark for your CLI. Shown on bare invoke or --help. Vertical gradient between two hex colors. Respects NO_COLOR. Includes minimal block-letter renderer.

items.name: config
items.title: config
items.description: Profile-aware JSON config loader. Reads from the app's config directory with multi-profile support (--profile production). Merge precedence: defaults < profile overrides.

items.name: session
items.title: session
items.description: Auth token persistence. Load on boot, save after login, clear on logout, check expiry. Atomic writes, 0o600 permissions. The companion of every login command.

items.name: error-map
items.title: error-map
items.description: Typed AppError class with code, name, human message, and hint. Maps upstream API errors to actionable messages. Agents read the hint field to self-correct.

items.name: global-flags
items.title: global-flags
items.description: Standard global flags for agent-first CLIs: --json, --dry-run, --profile, --no-input, --quiet, --verbose. Normalizes raw argv into typed GlobalFlags. Includes flag definitions for any parser.

items.name: telemetry
items.title: telemetry
items.description: Anonymous usage tracking. Opt-out via CLI_NO_TELEMETRY=1 or DO_NOT_TRACK=1. Local JSONL logging + optional remote POST. Never throws, never blocks. Disabled in CI automatically.

items.name: killswitch
items.title: killswitch
items.description: Binary safety gate. If ~/.app/KILLSWITCH exists, all write operations refuse. File exists = stopped. File gone = resumed. One fs.existsSync call. Battle-tested in hapi-cli for real brokerage orders.
